title: VGC Cobblemon
description: A cobblemon modpack featuring a variety of vanilla+ mods and cobblemon addons
body:
This is a modpack that focuses on the Cobblemon mod and has been designed for the VGC community. It includes a large number of Cobblemon addons (e.g. Ascension Megamons), as well as many other mods to enhance the vanilla experience (e.g. Amendments) and general performance improving mods (e.g. Sodium).

This modpack is designed for both client-side and server-side use, and can be used in both singleplayer and multiplayer.
